title: arenaria capillaris subsp. nardifolia
intro: Arenaria capillaris subsp. nardifolia, also known as Sea Pink or Nardifolia Arenaria, is a species of flowering plant in the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Arenaria capillaris subsp. nardifolia include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
